SELECT s.Name, s.Capacity
FROM stadium s
JOIN concert c ON s.Stadium_ID = c.Stadium_ID
WHERE c.Year > '2013'
GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
final.answer_text: The stadium with the most concerts after 2013 is Somerset Park, with a capacity of 11,998.
